title: Recruit ≥2 qualified reviewers or engage a museum/GLAM-Wikimedia community
context: M1's definition of done requires ≥2 qualified reviewers or a partner museum/GLAM-Wikimedia community engaged. Without reviewers, no description or translation can be signed off, and the pipeline cannot scale. Reviewer recruitment must follow the qualification criteria defined in reviewers-001. Candidate channels include museum networks, GLAM-Wikimedia partners, and academic or heritage-professional communities.
objective: Conduct outreach to recruit ≥2 qualified reviewers (one domain-aware and at least one qualified bilingual for the first target language) or to engage a museum network / GLAM-Wikimedia community that can provide ongoing review coverage. Document the outreach process, candidate channels, conversations, and outcome (named reviewers or community partner) in a recruitment report.
acceptanceCriteria: Outreach conducted across ≥2 candidate channels (e.g., museum networks such as AAM small-museum community, GLAM-Wikimedia partner communities, regional museum associations, academic heritage departments)

≥2 qualified reviewers recruited who meet the criteria in reviewers-001 (or a museum/GLAM-Wikimedia community partner engaged that can provide review coverage), with their names/handles and qualified-reviewer roles recorded
Each reviewer's qualification confirmed against reviewers-001 criteria and recorded in a reviewer roster document committed to the repo
Recruitment process, outreach channels, response rates, and final outcome documented in a report
If fewer than 2 qualified reviewers are available for a target language, this is escalated to the maintainer/steward with a recommendation (e.g., limit scope to languages with coverage)
resources: multilingual-museum-labels-reviewers-001 (qualification criteria — must be in place first)
AAM (American Alliance of Museums) small-museum community
Collections Trust / UK Museum Development networks
output: docs/reviewer-roster.md — named qualified reviewers (or community partner) with qualification evidence and roles; docs/reviewer-recruitment-report.md documenting the outreach process
